commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a default-disabled `core/doctor/heartbeat-template` doctor lint health check that reports legacy `HEARTBEAT.md` template wrappers using the existing heartbeat repair analyzer, with focused tests for findings and lint selection.

PR surface: Source +74, Tests +119. Total +193 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is an additive lint-surface PR rather than a bug report. The PR body provides source CLI proof for the new default-skipped and explicit `--only` paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected `maintainer` label and draft state leave this in normal maintainer handling; I found no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: Expose heartbeat template doctor lint findings
target.body:
## Summary
- add a default-disabled `core/doctor/heartbeat-template` structured health check for legacy `HEARTBEAT.md` documentation-template wrappers
- reuse the existing heartbeat template analyzer so lint and legacy Doctor repair classify the same file shapes
- keep actual replacement in the existing `doctor --fix` path; lint only reads and reports findings
- no config, plugin, SDK, persisted data, or repair-path contract changes

## Real behavior proof
- Source CLI with isolated `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH`, `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR`, and workspace containing a legacy fenced `HEARTBEAT.md` template:
  - `node scripts/run-node.mjs doctor --lint --json` ran broad default lint with `heartbeat=0`, proving default lint skips the new default-disabled check
  - `node scripts/run-node.mjs doctor --lint --json --only core/doctor/heartbeat-template` ran `checksRun=1`, `checksSkipped=36`, emitted one `core/doctor/heartbeat-template` warning with `requirement: "legacy-template"`, and exited 1
- Focused source harness proves pure dirty templates, dirty templates with user content, clean templates, and missing heartbeat files.

## Validation
- `PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm exec oxlint src/commands/doctor-heartbeat-template-repair.ts src/commands/doctor-heartbeat-template-repair.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/commands/doctor-heartbeat-template-repair.ts src/commands/doctor-heartbeat-template-repair.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-heartbeat-template-repair.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm tsgo:core`
- `PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false node scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs --check`
- `PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false node scripts/sync-plugin-sdk-exports.mjs --check`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: giodl73-repo
